resolutions.votes: Moved by L. Chalapenko, Seconded by J. Scott

resolutions.title: Adjournment
resolutions.motion_text: THAT the meeting be adjourned. Time: 8:11 p.m. Next regular Council meeting to be held April 21, 2026
resolutions.votes: Moved by S. Kirkey, Seconded by J. Scott
